summary.label: Prediction coverage
summary.detail: All current Wall assets have AI care, renewal or proof-risk signals.

summary.label: Human review mode
summary.detail: AI can recommend, but FM leads approve client-impacting actions.

summary.label: Investor narrative
summary.detail: Operations data compounds into prediction, proof automation and renewal intelligence.

recommendations.trigger: Low-light sensor alert, leggy growth finding and high renewal risk overlap.
recommendations.recommendation: Move the next recovery visit 48 hours earlier and add an LED schedule proof screenshot.
recommendations.guardrail: Requires FM lead approval before dispatch or client-facing report use.

recommendations.trigger: Monthly ESG pack is due and the current proof gap is the full-wall report capture.
recommendations.recommendation: Prompt technician to capture before/after wall photos, timestamp, site trace and method note in one visit.
recommendations.guardrail: AI may prefill the checklist; ESG desk approves all claims.

recommendations.trigger: Renewal date is near, wall health is the lowest in portfolio and AR was recently overdue.
recommendations.recommendation: Generate a Renewal Proof Pack after risk recovery proof is approved.
recommendations.guardrail: Account lead reviews tone before sending to landlord or procurement.

recommendations.trigger: Replacement suggestion, water swing and nutrient stock alert indicate service kit risk.
recommendations.recommendation: Reserve replacement pods and nutrient stock before the next clinic care route.
recommendations.guardrail: Inventory desk confirms physical stock before purchase or route promise.

governance.label: Human-in-the-loop
governance.rule: AI recommendations create reviewable actions; they do not directly close work orders, approve proof or send reports.

governance.label: Evidence boundary
governance.rule: Every AI output must cite source records such as sensors, photos, work orders, invoices, incidents or method notes.

governance.label: ESG claims safety
governance.rule: AI cannot label a metric as certified, carbon neutral, WELL/LEED compliant or independently assured unless that evidence exists.

governance.label: Model audit trail
governance.rule: Queued AI actions are written into the audit ledger with actor, timestamp, entity and client scope.

flywheel.body: Sensors, mobile photos, work orders, route plans and client feedback create the raw living-asset record.
The system scores plant health risk, proof gaps, stock demand and renewal risk before they become visible client problems.
FM teams approve suggested visits, proof checklists, replacement kits and account actions.
Completed actions become audit-ready service proof, ESG method notes and renewal evidence.
Outcome data improves future risk scoring, care protocols and DR FOREST portfolio expansion decisions.
